biz_name: Unique Skin Studio - Custom Facials & Skin Medical SPA

analytics.last_inbound_snippet: What in the world are you guys doing. I canceled this.

cause_analysis.narrative: Unique Skin Studio - Custom Facials & Skin Medical SPA churned on 2026-02-17 after 266 days with Zoca. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 52 times, but the client only replied 8. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn. Median Zoca response time was 4.0 days, above the 24-hour expectation.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.
